headline: Decision gate ledger: 3 block, 3 warn; provider gates pass but execution remains blocked; guidance_state=not_ready.

gates.label: Provider run
gates.reading: Real provider run is present for the selected date.
gates.next_action: Keep the provider run in the daily path.

gates.label: Provider history
gates.reading: Provider history must include current and previous dates for share-change flow.
gates.next_action: Maintain provider CSV history across daily runs.

gates.label: Estimated-flow coverage
gates.next_action: Regenerate provider flow observations if coverage drops.

gates.label: True-flow coverage
gates.next_action: Keep representative ETF mappings and provider observations complete.

gates.label: Attribution conflicts
gates.next_action: Resolve or annotate attribution conflicts before relaxing readiness.

gates.label: Watchlist conflict review
gates.next_action: Review conflict rows before changing model thresholds.

gates.label: Confirmed watch rows
gates.next_action: Keep confirmed rows separate from conflict and single-line evidence rows.

gates.label: Valuation and fundamental reality
gates.reading: Valuation or fundamental modules still depend on manual seed inputs.
gates.next_action: Connect reviewed valuation and fundamental sources.

gates.label: Pool graph snapshot
gates.reading: Graph snapshot is available for pool-level explanation.
gates.next_action: Run cycle before pool analysis if the snapshot is absent.

gates.label: Data reality audit
gates.reading: Data reality still contains non-real, mixed, or manual layers.
gates.next_action: Remove or label non-real layers before execution language can unlock.

gates.label: Execution language safety

gates.next_action: Only change this gate after all blocker gates pass.
